method: Parse the authoritative 28-point register and 19-point supplemental register, verify unique IDs and live page anchors, and preserve their explicit implementation states.
warning: 47 / 47 listed means no request is omitted. It does not mean 47 / 47 completed. Only state=ready is complete for its stated page or audit deliverable; production cleaning remains separate.

stateDefinitions.ready: 页面或审计证据已完成。
stateDefinitions.partial: 方案或证据已有，生产实施仍未完成。
stateDefinitions.pending: 等待用户确认或最终验收。
